raw_sms: You received GHS 1,000.00 from FRANCIS APPIAH 0249876543. Trans.ID: 7391048265. Fee: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 0.00. New balance: GHS 2,150.00. 25/03/2026 22:10.
label: suspicious
notes: TEXT: 'You received' not 'You have received'. 'Trans.ID:' not 'Transaction ID:'. 'New balance:' not 'Your new balance is'. E-levy 0.00 on GHS 1000 (should be 10.00). Four deviations from canonical template.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 3,000.00 from PRINCE OWUSU 0241111234. Transaction ID: 8473920165. E-levy: GHS 30.00. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. Your new balance is GHS 3,070.00. 26/03/2026 03:14.
label: suspicious
notes: FIELD ORDER: E-levy line appears BEFORE Fee line. Real MTN always shows 'Fee charged' then 'E-levy'. Swapped sequence is a structural deviation.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 500.00 from Kwaku Mensah (0271234567). Transaction ID: 5839201748. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 5.00. Your new balance is GHS 502.50. 26/03/2026 14:03.
label: suspicious
notes: TWO DEVIATIONS: (1) Name in Title Case 'Kwaku Mensah' — real MTN uses ALL CAPS. (2) Phone in parentheses '(0271234567)' — real MTN shows bare number.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 5,000.00 from RICHARD BOATENG 0249871234. Transaction ID: 48293OI762. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 50.00. Your new balance is GHS 5,150.00. 27/03/2026 23:48.
label: suspicious
notes: TXN ID: '48293OI762' contains letters O and I mixed with digits. Real MTN IDs are pure 10-digit numeric. Regex \\d{10} would fail.

raw_sms: Cash In GHS 1,500.00 from agent BENJAMIN OFORI 0261111222. Transaction ID: 3948201756. Your new balance is GHS 1,500.00. Date: 28/03/2026 13:20.
label: suspicious
notes: THREE DEVIATIONS: (1) 'Cash In GHS' missing 'of' — real is 'Cash In of GHS'. (2) 'from agent' instead of 'at agent'. (3) 'Date: 28/03/2026' has explicit 'Date:' prefix — real MTN shows bare datetime.

raw_sms: URGENT: You have received GHS 10,000.00 on your MoMo wallet. To confirm this deposit click here: http://mtn-momo-gh.xyz/confirm and enter your PIN to complete. Act now before it expires!
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: STRUCTURE: No txn ID / balance / fee / counterparty / date. Contains URL + PIN request + urgency. Template completely different from any MTN format.

raw_sms: MTN MoMo: Dear customer your account has been credited with GHS 5,000.00. Verify your account immediately by sending your MoMo PIN to 0209999999 to avoid reversal of funds.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: WORDING: 'MTN MoMo:' prefix + 'Dear customer' — not how real MTN SMS starts. 'credited' not 'received'. Asks user to TEXT their PIN. Missing txn ID / balance / fee / date.

raw_sms: You have recieved GHS 3,500.00 into your MTN MoMo acount. Due to system maintanance your funds are on hold. Call 0207777321 imediately to release your funds before they are reversed.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: SPELLING: 'recieved' 'acount' 'maintanance' 'imediately' = 4 errors. Real MTN SMS is machine-generated with zero typos. Wrong template. No txn ID / balance / fee / counterparty / date.

raw_sms: Dear valued customer GHS 1,000.00 has been deposited into your MoMo by an anonymous benefactor. To accept funds reply with your full name date of birth and MoMo PIN to this number.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: WORDING: 'Dear valued customer' + 'deposited into your MoMo' + 'anonymous benefactor' — none appear in any MTN template. Asks for name + DOB + PIN (identity theft). Missing all standard fields.

raw_sms: Dear customer you have received GHC 6,000 in ur MoMo wallet from CHIEF NANA OSEI. Pls kindly send back GHC 3,000 to 0249999888 as it was sent by mistake. God bless you.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: CURRENCY: 'GHC' is old Ghana Cedi code (pre-2007) — real MTN uses 'GHS'. WORDING: 'Dear customer' + 'ur' + 'Pls kindly' = informal human language not system-generated. Social engineering asks victim to 'send back' money. Missing txn ID / balance / fee / date.
